channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mike Johnson faces challenging June with key deadlines approaching
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson faces a difficult stretch of deadlines and tough votes when the House returns from recess next week.

item.title: Delaney Hall faces first major test as DHS head under Markwayne Mullin
item.description: A New Jersey private detention center has become a key flashpoint in the debate over Trump's immigration policies.

item.title: Top House Hispanic Democrat faces existential fight for political survival
item.description: Congressional Hispanic Caucus chair Adriano Espaillat is in a tough reelection battle, according to fellow Democrats.

item.title: Judge orders Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center
item.description: A D.C. district judge signed an order Friday requiring President Trump's name to be removed from the Kennedy Center.
